hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: We are a dedicated education consultancy committed to transforming dreams into reality through expert guidance, comprehensive support, and unwavering commitment to student success.

about.mission: To empower students with expert guidance, comprehensive support, and access to world-class educational opportunities. We believe every student deserves the chance to pursue their dreams globally.
about.vision: To be the most trusted education consultancy in Bangladesh, known for transforming lives through quality education, language training, and comprehensive global opportunities.

values.description: Every decision is made with our students' success in mind.

destinations.name: Australia
destinations.shortDescription: World-class universities with excellent career opportunities
destinations.fullDescription: Australia offers a vibrant study environment with top-ranked universities, diverse culture, and excellent post-study work opportunities. Known for innovative education and high quality of life.

destinations.name: Canada
destinations.shortDescription: Affordable education with strong immigration pathways
destinations.fullDescription: Canada is a top destination for international students with affordable tuition, excellent universities, and clear pathways to permanent residency. Safe, multicultural, and welcoming.

destinations.name: Italy
destinations.shortDescription: Rich culture and history with affordable education
destinations.fullDescription: Italy combines world-class education with rich cultural heritage. Experience Renaissance art, history, and cuisine while studying at prestigious universities.

destinations.name: Malta
destinations.shortDescription: Gateway to Europe with quality education
destinations.fullDescription: Malta offers quality education in a strategic Mediterranean location. Perfect for students seeking European education with a welcoming international community.

destinations.name: South Korea
destinations.shortDescription: Advanced technology and innovative education system
destinations.fullDescription: South Korea is a hub for technology and innovation with cutting-edge universities. Experience modern education in a dynamic and fast-paced environment.

destinations.name: UK
destinations.fullDescription: The UK is home to world-renowned universities with centuries of academic excellence. Gain a qualification recognized globally and experience British culture.

destinations.name: Japan
destinations.fullDescription: Japan offers a unique blend of traditional culture and modern technology. Study at innovative universities while experiencing one of Asia's most advanced societies.

destinations.name: Cyprus
destinations.fullDescription: Cyprus combines Mediterranean charm with quality education. Enjoy beautiful weather, beaches, and excellent universities in a peaceful setting.

destinations.name: Russia
destinations.shortDescription: Affordable education with strong academic programs
destinations.fullDescription: Russia offers affordable education with strong programs in medicine, engineering, and sciences. Experience rich culture and history in major cities.

destinations.name: Denmark
destinations.fullDescription: Denmark offers innovative education in a progressive society. Known for quality of life, sustainability focus, and excellent universities.
